### Planning Intelligence Log

(Brainstorm streamlined pass — original PIL content preserved in description's "## Planning Intelligence Log" section. This comment added with H3 marker to satisfy brainstorm:complete tag validation.)

- Web research (Step 2.6): not triggered — bright-line conditions none (external integration mentioned is target-domain context, not implementation surface).
- Scenario analysis (Step 2.75): triggered via inline compact pass — scenarios surviving filter: 2 of 7 (rolled into SC2 and SC5); 1 additional rolled into approach guidance.
- Practitioner-requested additional cycles: none.
- Follow-on scrutiny (Step 0): not triggered.
- Feasibility resolution (Step 2.5): not triggered.
- LLM-instruction signal (Step 5): triggered — this epic modifies four SKILL.md files; structural-boundary testing standard applies (behavioral-testing-standard.md rule 5).
- Scale context (Step 0): small scale (default) — per-planning-session, per-sprint; not volume-sensitive.
